metadata.description: Agent skills for the full research-paper lifecycle: CFP parsing, venue tailoring, desk-reject preflight, literature search, rebuttals, camera-ready, and conference talks.

plugins.name: paper-search
plugins.description: Key-free scholarly search and legal open-access fetching: DBLP, Crossref, Semantic Scholar, arXiv, Unpaywall — plus citation verification and exemplar study.

plugins.name: paper-writing
plugins.description: Venue-aware academic writing: reflection passes, abstracts, related work, literature reviews, prose polish, and author/venue style matching grounded in verified citations.

plugins.name: paper-submission
plugins.description: The post-draft lifecycle nobody else covers: CFP requirement parsing, venue/track selection and tailoring, desk-reject preflight, anonymization, review triage, benchmark scorecards, rebuttals in all three real formats, and camera-ready rails for ACM and IEEE.

plugins.name: paper-presenting
plugins.description: From accepted paper to the podium: slide decks, talk scripts timed to the exact slot, Q&A rehearsal, and venue-sized posters.
